results.description: Baseline with original verbose skill (~50KB total)

Dramatically reduced skill size from ~50KB to ~6KB. Removed ooxml.md, ooxml/, scripts/, LICENSE.txt. Rewrote SKILL.md with focused create/extract workflows and working code examples. Simplified docx-js.md to essential API only.
Added --wrap=none to pandoc command, changed docx install instruction from global to local npm install, added explicit text verification step.
Enhanced extraction guidance: added python-docx as primary extraction method with concrete parsing tips (split, float conversion, table row skipping). Reduced reliance on fragile text parsing.

changes: Reduced total skill size from ~50KB to ~7KB (SKILL.md + docx-js.md only)
Removed ooxml.md, ooxml/ directory (schemas, scripts, validation), scripts/ directory (document library), LICENSE.txt
Rewrote SKILL.md with two focused sections: creating (docx npm) and extracting (pandoc + python-docx)
Added complete working code example for document creation with headings, bullets, and tables
Simplified docx-js.md to essential API: Document, Paragraph, TextRun, HeadingLevel, bullet lists, tables
Added concrete extraction tips: python-docx for structured data, pandoc with --wrap=none for plain text
Changed docx install from global to local (npm install docx) for reliability
